task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the 'Clean Desk and Screen Policy'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a form submission or a list entry in the Security Policies section of the Eramba GRC interface showing the policy name 'Clean Desk and Screen Policy'.

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the 'ISO 27001 Audit Prep' compliance package.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a form submission or a list entry in the Compliance Management/Analysis section showing the package name 'ISO 27001 Audit Prep'.

task_completion.description: Verify the addition of the requirement item 'A.11.2.9 - Clear Desk' to the compliance package.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the item code 'A.11.2.9' and name 'Clear Desk' (or 'Clear desk and clear screen policy') listed as a requirement inside the 'ISO 27001 Audit Prep' package.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent attempts to link the security policy to the compliance requirement.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a mapping interface, dropdown, or modal dialog where the agent is actively selecting 'Clean Desk and Screen Policy' to associate it with the 'A.11.2.9' compliance requirement (or vice versa).

task_completion.description: Verify the successful link between the security policy and the compliance requirement.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the final state showing the relationship is established. This could be a 'Mapped Policies' column showing 'Clean Desk and Screen Policy' next to 'A.11.2.9', a relationship tab displaying the link, or a success notification confirming the mapping.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Eramba GRC graphical user interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots should show interaction with the Eramba web interface (menus, forms, buttons) rather than terminal commands, API scripts, or database queries.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with a real web browser.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots should show a standard web browser window (like Chrome or Firefox) navigating the Eramba application, not a text editor or mocked interface.

integrity.description: Verify the browser's developer tools were not used to fake the results.
integrity.visual_evidence: Ensure there is no browser Developer Tools panel open (Inspect Element) being used to alter the DOM text to fake the existence of the policies or packages.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires interacting with Eramba GRC software. Verified expected values: Policy Name is 'Clean Desk and Screen Policy' (description may contain keywords 'sensitive documents' and 'locked away'). Compliance Package Name is 'ISO 27001 Audit Prep'. Requirement Item Code is 'A.11.2.9' and Item Name is 'Clear desk and clear screen policy' (or 'Clear Desk'). The final goal is a verified link between the policy and the compliance requirement within the Eramba interface.
